title: gpt-bot waits for blip editing to complete before replying
summary: The bot no longer replies to intermediate editing deltas. It checks for the 'user/d/' annotation (set while a user is actively editing) and skips handleBlip() until editing is complete.

items: gpt-bot no longer generates a reply for every keystroke — waits until the user finishes editing (user/d/ annotation absent) before responding
